narrative: Single-attempt SSH login failure from the playground monitoring-host (172.22.0.10) using the sentinel username 'testuser' against target-endpoint. No successful login followed. The approved-monitoring-sources anchor confirmed the source/username/target triple is sanctioned under the monitoring-host cron at the observed cadence. Closed benign as monitoring-probe.

rule.description: Attempt to login using a non-existent user

anchors_at_time.citation: monitoring-host 172.22.0.10 -> target-endpoint (testuser, ~10min cadence) is on the approved list
